meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: ‘Orban constantly vetoes’: Europe braces for Hungary election
items.summary: The practicalities of Hungary’s election may not matter as much as the psychological impact, say observers.

items.title: Iran’s ex-foreign minister Kharazi ‘gravely wounded’ in attack on his home
items.summary: Apparent assassination attempt comes as Iran's army pledges to fight until the US, Israel face 'permanent surrender'.

items.title: Oil price surges, Asian stocks fall as Trump vows to continue Iran attacks
items.summary: Asian stocks also took a hit after Trump’s speech as most Southeast Asian countries rely heavily on oil imports.

items.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 34 of US-Israel attacks?
items.summary: As the war enters day 34, US President Donald Trump said Washington was close to achieving its objectives.

items.title: Mourners vow resistance as Iran marks Islamic Republic’s 47th anniversary
items.summary: Thousands gathered in Tehran to honour a commander, vowing resistance amid heightened tension with US and Israel.

items.title: ‘It all depends on the crop’: Gulf crisis hits South Asia farmers
items.summary: As sowing season approaches across the region, farmers face scarcity and rising cost of fertiliser.

items.title: Israel’s death penalty law is not about executing Palestinians
items.summary: It is about eliminating Palestinian existence in Palestine.

items.title: How long will Artemis II take to reach the moon, and what happens next?
items.summary: The capsule is expected to reach the moon on about April 6, the sixth day of the mission.

items.title: Trump’s primetime speech on Iran war: Key takeaways
items.summary: US president says Washington is 'getting very close' to achieving goals as he promises to bomb Iran into 'Stone Ages'.

items.title: Trump’s national address on Iran ’embarrassing, incoherent’
items.summary: Harlan Ullman, a former senior US naval officer, has slammed President Trump’s address to the nation.

items.title: Trump claims ‘success’ in Iran in just 32 days compared to lengthy US wars
items.summary: US President Donald Trump said Iran was the ‘bully of the Middle East’ but is ‘no longer a threat’.

items.title: Trump threatens to bring Iran ‘back to the Stone Ages’
items.summary: President Trump says the US will bring Iran ‘back to the Stone Ages where they belong' by striking hard.

items.title: Trump urges countries ‘get involved’ in war on Iran if they can’t get fuel
items.summary: US President Donald Trump says nations that rely on oil from the Strait of Hormuz should build up some delayed courage.

items.title: Gambia police fire tear gas at rally over rearrest of siblings
items.summary: Police fired tear gas and water cannons at protesters in the Gambia who were demanding the release of two siblings.

items.title: Tiger Woods declines 2027 Ryder Cup captaincy; can leave US for treatment
items.summary: The 15-time major winner will focus on health following his car crash and subsequent DUI arrest on Friday.

items.title: Live: Trump threatens more attacks against Iran; Tehran vows to fight back
items.summary: Trump says the US is close to completing its core objectives, but Tehran says it won't tolerate 'vicious cycle of war'

items.title: Magnitude 7.4 quake hits off Indonesia’s Ternate, tsunami warning lifted
items.summary: The ​epicentre of the ⁠earthquake was about ⁠120km (75 miles) from Ternate, in Indonesia's North Maluku ‌province.

items.title: FBI agents from US arrive in Cuba to probe lethal speedboat shooting
items.summary: Trump administration has denied involvement after Cuban government says a boat of armed men tried to infiltrate island.

items.title: First troops from UN-backed Gang Suppression Force arrive in Haiti
items.summary: The force has an initial mandate of 12 months to address widespread gang violence in Haiti ahead of its elections.

items.title: Watch the moment Artemis II launches historic mission around the moon
items.summary: NASA successfully launched four astronauts into space on Wednesday evening, for a 10-day flight to the moon.

items.title: NASA successfully launches historic Artemis II moon mission
items.summary: The mission is a major step in NASA’s plan to return humans to the moon and eventually send astronauts to Mars.

items.title: US removes sanctions on Venezuela’s interim President Delcy Rodriguez
items.summary: US has exerted growing influence over the Venezuelan government after abducting former President Nicolas Maduro.

items.title: NASA moon mission a ‘contrast’ to US war on Iran, says US senator
items.summary: Astronauts have boarded NASA’s Orion capsule as they prepare for the first crewed lunar mission in more than 50 years.

items.title: SpaceX files to go public, paving way to make Elon Musk first trillionaire
items.summary: Company has captured public attention through vast network of satellites and focus on space exploration.

items.title: Smoke and embers seen over Iran’s Isfahan after strike
items.summary: Video captured a massive column of smoke and burning embers towering over Isfahan, Iran following a US-Israeli strike.
